title: verify_story Refactor and Operator Dashboard for manual: Criteria

story.i_want_to: have the verify_story endpoint enqueue a verification run instead of transitioning state directly, and have a dashboard where I can batch-review manual: acceptance criteria without context switching per story
story.so_that: verification is always backed by independent re-execution, and manual review criteria (legacy or intentional) don't block throughput

rationale: Without a refactor, `verify_story` still takes the caller's word. With US-26.4.2 and US-26.4.3 in place, the endpoint should enqueue a run and wait for results. For manual: criteria (legacy stories or intentionally human-reviewed ones), an operator dashboard gives efficient batching.

acceptance_criteria.description: `POST /api/v1/stories/:id/verify` no longer transitions state directly. It validates the verify_cap (from US-26.3.1), enqueues a verification_run, and returns 202 Accepted with `{status: "verification_pending", run_id: "..."}` and a `next_action` describing how to poll the run.

The verification_run's completion callback (the Oban worker after the run finishes) transitions the story to `:verified` IF all non-manual ACs pass AND no manual ACs are pending (i.e., they're all already approved). Otherwise transitions to `:manual_review_pending` or `:rejected`.
If any AC has type `manual`, the story status flag `manual_review_pending` is set and the story waits for operator decisions before final verification.

LiveView at `/admin/manual-reviews` lists all pending manual ACs across the operator's tenants (or a single tenant if the operator is tenant-scoped). Each row shows the story, the AC, the description, the commit SHA, and action buttons: Approve, Reject, Request More Info.
Bulk approval: checkbox per row, 'approve selected' button. Rate-limited to prevent rubber-stamping — max 20 approvals per minute per operator.
Approval and rejection both write audit_chain entries. Approval includes the operator's dispatch lineage and an optional note. Rejection includes a required reason.

A story with all non-manual ACs passing but some manual ACs pending transitions to `manual_review_pending`, not `verified`. Once the operator approves all pending manual ACs, the story auto-transitions to `verified`.
Existing tests for `verify_story` are updated: they await the verification_run before asserting state change. Tests use Oban.drain_queue to process the runs synchronously.
Tenant isolation: operators see only their tenant's manual reviews. Superadmin sees all.
OpenAPI updates for the new verify response shape and the new dashboard routes. CHANGELOG entry.

test_cases.name: verify_story returns 202 and enqueues a run
expected_results: Body has status: verification_pending and run_id

test_cases.name: Run completion with all passes transitions story to verified
steps: Run drains queue with stub runner that returns all-pass

test_cases.name: Manual AC pending blocks verified transition
preconditions: Story with one test AC and one manual AC
steps: Run drains (test AC passes, manual AC is pending)

test_cases.name: Operator approves pending manual AC, story auto-verifies
preconditions: Story in manual_review_pending state with one pending manual AC

technical_notes: Bulk approval rate limit: reuse Hammer.
The verification_run completion callback is an Oban worker chained after VerificationRunner: VerificationCompletionWorker reads the run and transitions the story.
verify_story response shape changes from 200 to 202; existing clients need migration. Include deprecation period and deprecation header during cutover.
